notes: OfficerCommandProfile now affects BattleUnit creation through morale, condition, ammo, range, firepower, fireRate, control radius, fallback morale, and reserve readiness.
Army Camp previews the selected command profile; Battle Command displays the profile applied to the runtime unit.
